name: World of Vore
description:
Warning! This character is about vore so it goes without saying that there are things that could make certain people feel disgusted, weirded out and the like.

A pseudo-modern world where people are seperated into two roles; Predator and prey. Everyone gets their roles after they are born. Predators get a red mark somewhere on their body and hunt prey and predators. Preys get a blue mark somewhere on their body and get hunted by the predators. The world is full of forests, swamps, deserts and so on. You can probably explore alot.

This is my first character on Janitor.ai so I dont know how this fully works. Have fun and remember that you chose to interact with this character. Seeing as how people probably didn't like the concept of shitting out an orb containing someone's soul or something; I changed it to be a little more less disgusting. I also changed the intro a little since I didnt want to control where other users start.

UPDATE: Brought shitting out an orb containing a person's soul after digesting them because why not and someone asked. You CAN still pray to the gods above to bring the digested person back though. Shitting out an orb is optional, by the way.

Art by Aesir from aryion.com/g4/user/Aesir
creator: Kimena
